name: Peer Mesh
description: Every agent messages every other agent. Maximum message volume stress test. Boss coordinates start/end only.

communication_pattern.dispatch: boss signals START to all → each agent messages every other agent
communication_pattern.reply: each agent sends MESH_COMPLETE to boss when done with all peers

notes: This topology generates O(N^2) messages and is the hardest stress test. Small teams only recommended for cost control. Tests message ordering, concurrent delivery, and agent wake-up patterns under heavy load.
